Title: Iconic Pop Art Style Girl with Green Hair and Cityscape Silhouette
Description:
Celebrate a nostalgic and vibrant feeling with this unique pop art illustration. Featuring a cheerful portrait of a girl with bright green hair and blue eyes, the artwork is set against a striking cityscape silhouette at sunset.

The modern, colorful style makes this piece a fantastic addition to any decor, adding a playful and upbeat vibe to your space. It’s perfect for fans of retro pop culture, vintage aesthetics, and bold graphic design.

Ideal for:

  • A fun piece of wall art in a creative space.
  • A unique gift for pop culture enthusiasts or friends.
  • Bedroom or office decor with a playful touch.

Enjoy the high-quality print that brings the vibrant colors of this timeless character portrait to life!
